ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/NemoClaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/NemoClaw
Language: typescript
Run agents like Hermes and OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/firecrawl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl
Language: typescript
The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale. 🔥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: garrytan/gstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/design.md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/design.md
Language: typescript
A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: heygen-com/hyperframes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes
Language: typescript
Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

Language: typescript
📝A simple and elegant markdown editor, available for Linux, macOS and Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/playwright
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/playwright
Language: typescript
Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nocodb/nocodb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb
Language: typescript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
Language: typescript
OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thesysdev/openui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thesysdev/openui
Language: typescript
The Open Standard for Generative UI
